mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT ${columnName} FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT t1.* FROM timetable t1, timetable t2 WHERE t1.semester_id = t2.semester_id AND t1.is_deleted = t2.is_deleted AND (t1.class_no = t2.class_no OR t1.teacher_no = t2.teacher_no OR t1.room_no = t2.room_no) -- 同个体 AND (t1.timeslot = t2.timeslot AND (t1.start_week <= t2.end_week AND t2.start_week<= t1.end_week) AND t1.biweekly+t2.biweekly != 3) -- 同时 AND t1.id != t2.id -- 不同任务 AND t1.is_deleted = 0 AND t1.semester_id = #{semesterId} ) AS base_result;

SELECT id FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT t1.* FROM timetable t1, timetable t2 WHERE t1.semester_id = t2.semester_id AND t1.is_deleted = t2.is_deleted AND (t1.class_no = t2.class_no OR t1.teacher_no = t2.teacher_no OR t1.room_no = t2.room_no) -- 同个体 AND (t1.timeslot = t2.timeslot AND (t1.start_week<=t2.end_week AND t2.start_week<= t1.end_week) AND t1.biweekly+t2.biweekly != 3) -- 同时 AND t1.id != t2.id -- 不同任务 AND t1.is_deleted = 0 AND t1.semester_id = #{semesterId} ) AS base_result WHERE ${columnName} = #{no};

SELECT '同班级同时间多次上课冲突' AS conflict_type, t2.* FROM timetable t1, timetable t2 WHERE t1.semester_id = t2.semester_id AND t1.is_deleted = t2.is_deleted AND (t1.class_no = t2.class_no) -- 同个体 AND (t1.timeslot = t2.timeslot AND (t1.start_week<=t2.end_week AND t2.start_week<= t1.end_week) AND t1.biweekly+t2.biweekly != 3) -- 同时 AND t1.id != t2.id -- 不同任务 AND t1.id = #{id} UNION SELECT '同教师同时间多次教学冲突' AS conflict_type, t2.* FROM timetable t1, timetable t2 WHERE t1.semester_id = t2.semester_id AND t1.is_deleted = t2.is_deleted AND (t1.teacher_no = t2.teacher_no) -- 同个体 AND (t1.timeslot = t2.timeslot AND (t1.start_week<=t2.end_week AND t2.start_week<= t1.end_week) AND t1.biweekly+t2.biweekly != 3) -- 同时 AND t1.id != t2.id -- 不同任务 AND t1.id = #{id} UNION SELECT '同教室同时间多次使用冲突' AS conflict_type, t2.* FROM timetable t1, timetable t2 WHERE t1.semester_id = t2.semester_id AND t1.is_deleted = t2.is_deleted AND (t1.room_no = t2.room_no) -- 同个体 AND (t1.timeslot = t2.timeslot AND (t1.start_week<=t2.end_week AND t2.start_week<= t1.end_week) AND t1.biweekly+t2.biweekly != 3) -- 同时 AND t1.id != t2.id -- 不同任务 AND t1.id = #{id} UNION SELECT '该班级此时间段禁排' AS conflict_type, t.* FROM timetable t JOIN exclusion_rule er WHERE t.timeslot = er.timeslot AND t.class_no = er.class_no AND t.id = #{id} UNION SELECT '该教室此时间段禁排' AS conflict_type, t.* FROM timetable t JOIN exclusion_rule er WHERE t.timeslot = er.timeslot AND t.room_no = er.room_no AND t.id = #{id} UNION SELECT '该课程此时间段禁排' AS conflict_type, t.* FROM timetable t JOIN exclusion_rule er WHERE t.timeslot = er.timeslot AND t.course_no = er.course_no AND t.id = #{id} UNION SELECT '该教室此时间段禁排' AS conflict_type, t.* FROM timetable t JOIN exclusion_rule er WHERE t.timeslot = er.timeslot AND t.teacher_no = er.teacher_no AND t.id = #{id}
